{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Heaven’s Glory School defensive formation
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A defensive formation at the [[Heaven’s Glory School]] uses a script to call battle-constructs out of the ground.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
